title: Cinematic Pack
description: A modpack aiming to make Minecraft very cinematic while only adding as few of new blocks as possible and beating the game pretty much like vanilla.
body:
"As a child i yearned for the mines..." -Steve
Don't worry there is nothing related to the Minecraft Movie in this modpack.

This modpack is for making Minecraft really **cinematic** and **immersive** while only adding a few blocks, keeping is **almost vanilla**.

This is also my first public modpack but i put alot of work into this to make sure the performance is good while looking incredible.

This pack wouldn't have looked as cool if this video didn't exist.
